div.style: font-size:1.5rem; font-weight:900; color:#2B9F78; margin-top:0.25rem; text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(43,159,120,0.6);
font-size:1.5rem; font-weight:900; color:#56B4E9; margin-top:0.25rem; text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(86,180,233,0.5);

span.style: font-size:0.75rem; padding:0.2rem 0.5rem; background-color:rgba(0,114,178,0.3); color:#56B4E9; border-radius:0.25rem; font-weight:800; border:1px solid #0072B2;

font-size:0.75rem; padding:0.2rem 0.5rem; background-color:rgba(43,159,120,0.3); color:#2B9F78; border-radius:0.25rem; font-weight:800; border:1px solid #2B9F78;

div.style: height:0.5rem; background-color:rgba(213,94,0,0.2); border-radius:9999px; overflow:hidden; margin-top:0.25rem; border:1px solid #D55E00;
width:49.1%; height:100%; background: linear-gradient(to right, #D55E00, #E69F00, #F0E442); border-radius:9999px; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(240,228,66,0.4);
